title: Leetcode 737. Sentence Similarity II
shortDescription: Given two equal-length word arrays and a list of similar word pairs where similarity is transitive, determine whether each pair of words at the same index are equivalent (identical or connected through a chain of similarities); this is typically solved by building connectivity (union-find or graph traversal) among words.

Leetcode 737. Sentence Similarity II

Given two equal-length word arrays and a list of similar word pairs where similarity is transitive, determine whether each pair of words at the same index are equivalent (identical or connected through a chain of similarities); this is typically solved by building connectivity (union-find or graph traversal) among words.
